name: taxfill
description: Draft-prepare a U.S. tax return from your documents — fills official IRS/state PDFs from cited, source-verified knowledge. Not tax advice; review-only, paper filing (no e-file).
long_description: TaxFill is a local MCP server that helps a person prepare a paper U.S. federal or state (34 states + DC) income-tax return for review. It downloads the official blank PDF, fills it from your confirmed inputs, computes lines from source-verified tax tables, and shows every figure's authority. It never invents numbers, never e-files, and is not a substitute for a professional.

tools.name: list_forms
tools.description: List available form packs (optionally filtered by jurisdiction/year).

tools.name: get_form_map
tools.description: Return one pack's line->field map, relations, and cross-form refs.

tools.name: fetch_blank
tools.description: Download the official blank PDF (checksum-verified) and return its local path.

tools.name: fill_form
tools.description: Deterministically fill a form. `values` maps line ids (per get_form_map) to values.

tools.name: verify_form
tools.description: Verify a filled form against its pack: assertions, relation math + independent recompute,

tools.name: verify_filing
tools.description: Verify a whole filing across forms: cross-form identity + inter-form relations.

tools.name: render_form
tools.description: Render PDF pages to PNG images (returned as MCP image content) for vision review.

tools.name: calc
tools.description: Deterministic tax math. op in {tax, standard_deduction, se_tax, additional_medicare_tax, niit, tax_with_preferential_rates, taxable_social_security, excess_ss, student_loan_interest_deduction, education_credits, ptc_annual}; every result shows its

tools.name: residency
tools.description: Federal residency (NRA/RA/dual-status) via the Substantial Presence Test + exempt years.

tools.name: intake_checklist
tools.description: Next interview questions + required documents for a (partial) profile. Empty profile = start.

tools.name: list_document_kinds
tools.description: Supported tax-document types and their official box layouts (W-2, 1099-*, 1098-*, 1042-S).

tools.name: extract_document
tools.description: Structure + validate YOUR reading of one tax document into provenance-tagged fields.

tools.name: workspace_save
tools.description: Persist the intake profile to the local resumable workspace (taxfill-workspace/<year>/).

tools.name: workspace_load
tools.description: Resume: load the saved profile + status from the local workspace (None profile if new).

tools.name: workspace_record_position
tools.description: Record one decided position with its authority into the audit trail.

tools.name: workspace_reconcile
tools.description: Generate RECONCILIATION.md (positions + authority) and CHECKLIST.md from recorded state.

tools.name: state_scope
tools.description: Which states require a return for the year, in what role, with forms/benefits/warnings.

tools.name: estimate_refund
tools.description: Early bottom-line ESTIMATE (a range) from a partial profile + confirmed income amounts.

tools.name: get_sources
tools.description: Ranked official .gov sources for a topic + the freshness change-channels (freshness protocol).

tools.name: filing_summary
tools.description: Plain-language bottom line per return (refund/owed + deadline & refund-SOL status) for approval.

tools.name: file_and_pay
tools.description: Last-mile checklist per return: pay, sign, assemble, mail, records, deadlines. Same manifest as filing_summary.

tools.name: hand_fill_worksheet
tools.description: Print-only state forms (no fillable fields): compute a line->value worksheet to hand-write onto the printed blank.
